---
title: "MAT103 Calculus Stories"
---

# Welcome

This website is a collection of **calculus stories**.

We explore how mathematical ideas evolved over time:
- continuity
- Fourier series
- limits
- infinitesimals

## What this project is about

Instead of only learning formulas, we explore the story of:

> how calculus was *discovered*, *challenged*, and *rebuilt* over generations.
